serviceNotes.engine oil: Model Year 2022 onwards BRZ scheduled maintenance is every 12 months or 15,000 km (whichever occurs first); engine oil and oil filter are marked replace (R) at every A–H service in Subaru Australia’s MY22+ BRZ/WRX Warranty and Service Handbook.
serviceNotes.interior ventilation filter: The handbook lists interior ventilation filter as inspect (I) at each A–H service. This entry uses 30,000 km / 24 months as a practical replacement cadence between inspections under normal driving; replace sooner if airflow is reduced or odours persist.
serviceNotes.air cleaner element: Maintenance table shows air cleaner inspect/replace pattern I I R I I R I I across services A–H (replace at 45,000 km / 36 months and 90,000 km / 72 months in the repeating 120,000 km cycle).
serviceNotes.spark plugs: Handbook maintenance schedule includes spark plug replacement (R) for MY22+ BRZ; interval recorded as 120,000 km / 120 months to match the long-life iridium replace row in the same BRZ/WRX handbook table (after 96 months / 120,000 km the sequence repeats).
serviceNotes.brake fluid: Brake fluid shows replace (R) on every second scheduled service (I R I R…) on the 15,000 km / 12 month service rhythm, equivalent to every 24 months.
serviceNotes.inspect disc brake pads: Disc brake pads and discs are inspected (I) at each scheduled maintenance interval under normal driving conditions.
serviceNotes.rear differential oil: Rear differential oil (Subaru BRZ only) follows I R I R across A–H services — replace every 30,000 km / 24 months on the published normal driving schedule.
serviceNotes.automatic transmission fluid: Automatic transmission fluid (Subaru BRZ only) is replace (R) at the E service (75,000 km / 60 months) in the MY22+ handbook grid; inspect (I) at other listed services.
serviceNotes.coolant: Coolant replacement (R) appears at the H service (120,000 km / 96 months) with Subaru Genuine Long Life coolant only; other intervals show inspect (I).
serviceNotes.manual transmission oil: Manual transmission oil is inspect (I) at each A–H service in the handbook; many owners exchange fluid near 120,000 km after track use or if oil condition is poor.

serviceSources.engine oil: https://docs.subaru.com.au/MY22%20onwards%20Subaru%20BRZ_WRX%20Warranty%20and%20Service%20Handbook.pdf — MY22+ Subaru BRZ/WRX: 12 months or 15,000 km service intervals; engine oil & filter R each scheduled service. https://www.subaru.com.au/servicing/scheduled-service-intervals
serviceSources.interior ventilation filter: https://docs.subaru.com.au/MY22%20onwards%20Subaru%20BRZ_WRX%20Warranty%20and%20Service%20Handbook.pdf — interior ventilation filter I each A–H service; 30,000 km / 24 months replacement cadence between inspections for normal use.
serviceSources.air cleaner element: https://docs.subaru.com.au/MY22%20onwards%20Subaru%20BRZ_WRX%20Warranty%20and%20Service%20Handbook.pdf — air cleaner element I I R I I R I I across maintenance services A–H.
serviceSources.spark plugs: https://docs.subaru.com.au/MY22%20onwards%20Subaru%20BRZ_WRX%20Warranty%20and%20Service%20Handbook.pdf — MY22+ maintenance schedule table, spark plugs R per published BRZ row (120,000 km / 120 months in repeating cycle).
serviceSources.brake fluid: https://docs.subaru.com.au/MY22%20onwards%20Subaru%20BRZ_WRX%20Warranty%20and%20Service%20Handbook.pdf — brake fluid I R I R on A–H grid (replace every second service ≈ 24 months).
serviceSources.inspect disc brake pads: https://docs.subaru.com.au/MY22%20onwards%20Subaru%20BRZ_WRX%20Warranty%20and%20Service%20Handbook.pdf — disc brake pads and discs I each scheduled service.
serviceSources.rear differential oil: https://docs.subaru.com.au/MY22%20onwards%20Subaru%20BRZ_WRX%20Warranty%20and%20Service%20Handbook.pdf — rear differential oil (Subaru BRZ only) I R I R across services A–H.
serviceSources.automatic transmission fluid: https://docs.subaru.com.au/MY22%20onwards%20Subaru%20BRZ_WRX%20Warranty%20and%20Service%20Handbook.pdf — automatic transmission fluid (Subaru BRZ only) replace at E service (75,000 km / 60 months).
serviceSources.coolant: https://docs.subaru.com.au/MY22%20onwards%20Subaru%20BRZ_WRX%20Warranty%20and%20Service%20Handbook.pdf — coolant R at H service (120,000 km / 96 months), Subaru Genuine Longlife coolant only.
serviceSources.manual transmission oil: https://docs.subaru.com.au/MY22%20onwards%20Subaru%20BRZ_WRX%20Warranty%20and%20Service%20Handbook.pdf — manual transmission oil I each service; 120,000 km exchange is preventive when fluid degrades or after track use.
